rationale: Phase B verifies per-rep rationals (V_quad -53/36, QL15 -89/36, QL05 +31/4) at tol=1e-30 maxcoeff=1e15 with HARD HYGIENE (tol=1e-30 vs tol=1e-12) passing identically. Phase C finds no parsimonious unifying f(Delta_b, A) consistent with all 3 non-anomalous reps to <1e-30. Phase D finds no 4-rep-consistent candidate. Per-rep rationals stand as a discrete catalogue; G20 closure via 017c (partition-with-per-rep-rationals) is unchanged.
structural_subfindings_flagged_for_claud: A=3 sub-family: (2A)^2 * a_1 = 4*Delta_b - 9 fits {V_quad, QL15} but FAILS QL05 (residual 7.39) and QL09 (residual 0.359)
2-rep linear: a_1[V_quad] - a_1[QL15] = 1 (algebraic restriction of A=3 sub-family)
picture_recommendation: hold v1.10; do NOT amend to v1.11; A=3 sub-family relation is candidate axiom for future A-stratified picture once more A=4 non-anomalous reps are available (Q24-(b))
